# Exact pins for the packaged macOS app. Two builds of the same Estormi
# release must produce identical bytes — every transitive dep is `==`-pinned AND
# `--hash=sha256:`-pinned, and `make bundle` installs with `--require-hashes`, so
# a yanked-and-re-uploaded or compromised wheel for a pinned version can't slip
# into the signed app. Regenerate the hashes after editing any pin:
#     python scripts/lock_bundle_hashes.py
# (a contract test fails if any pin lacks a hash). Dev installs use
# `estormi_server/requirements.txt`; see pyproject.toml for the rationale.
aiosqlite==0.22.1 \
    --hash=sha256:043e0bd78d32888c0a9ca90fc788b38796843360c855a7262a532813133a0650 \
    --hash=sha256:21c002eb13823fad740196c5a2e9d8e62f6243bd9e7e4a1f87fb5e44ecb4fceb
annotated-types==0.7.0 \
    --hash=sha256:1f02e8b43a8fbbc3f3e0d4f0f4bfc8131bcb4eebe8849b8e5c773f3a1c582a53 \
    --hash=sha256:aff07c09a53a08bc8cfccb9c85b05f1aa9a2a6f23728d790723543408344ce89
anyio==4.14.1 \
    --hash=sha256:4e5533c5b8ff0a24f5d7a176cbe6877129cd183893f66b537f8f227d10527d72 \
    --hash=sha256:8d648a3544c1a700e3ff78615cd679e4c5c3f149904287e73687b2596963629e

# `/graphify` repo skill. Pins were derived from `uv pip install graphifyy>=0.8.19`
# into the dev .venv (Python 3.12) on 2026-05-26; re-pin if the next packaged
# release picks a newer graphifyy. The tree-sitter-* grammars are the language
# coverage — adding/removing here changes which file types the graph can parse.

# On-device briefing narration — Voxtral TTS via MLX (Apple Silicon only). The
# Mac synthesizes the briefing to .m4a (memory_core/tts_local.py); the iOS
# companion just plays it. Pins derived from `uv pip install mlx-audio soundfile
# mistral-common[audio]` into the dev .venv (Python 3.12) on 2026-06-06. Many
# transitive deps (rich, typer, tqdm, transformers' own, safetensors via hf) are
# already pinned above; only the genuinely new ones are listed here.
